summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CyberDeck DJ Turntable app. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend UI loads correctly with cyberpunk theme, station browser functions, but critical audio playback fails due to CORS restrictions.

integration_issues.issue: Radio stream playback fails due to CORS policy blocking access to external radio URLs
integration_issues.impact: No stations can play audio - core functionality broken
integration_issues.error_details: CORS error: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header present on requested resource

passed_tests: Station fetching for all genres (hip hop, rnb, trap, soul)
Frontend app loading with cyberpunk theme
Genre tab switching (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL)
Station list display (30 stations per genre)
Control panel UI (knobs, buttons, VU meters visible)

success_percentage.audio_integration: 0% - Critical CORS blocking prevents all audio playback

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Audio playback completely blocked by CORS policy
action_item_for_main_agent.description: Radio stream URLs from Radio Browser API cannot be played due to CORS restrictions. Need to implement audio proxy or find CORS-enabled radio streams.
suggested_fixes: Implement backend audio proxy to relay radio streams with proper CORS headers
Filter Radio Browser API results to only return stations with CORS-enabled streams
Add CORS proxy service or use alternative radio API that supports CORS

should_call_test_agent_after_fix: true - Audio integration needs thorough retesting after CORS issue is resolved
should_main_agent_test_itself: false - Critical functionality completely broken, needs full retest
